message:
fix(node): saturating arithmetic for counter increments in 13 tools modules

Replaces bare += 1 with saturating_add(1) on all counter fields
across the tools subsystem. These counters are incremented by
external events (report generation, benchmark runs, evaluations)
and could overflow in long-running nodes:

- benchmark_methodology.rs: 2 counters
- enterprise_governance.rs: 4 counters
- evidence_replay_validator.rs: 3 counters
- external_replication_claims.rs: 1 counter
- migration_incident_datasets.rs: 3 counters
- migration_speed_failure_metrics.rs: 1 counter
- migration_validation_cohorts.rs: 1 counter
- partner_lighthouse_programs.rs: 1 counter
- redteam_evaluations.rs: 3 counters
- report_output_contract.rs: 2 counters
- transparent_reports.rs: 4 counters
- vef_perf_budget_gate.rs: 4 counters
- verifier_benchmark_releases.rs: 1 counter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
